_comment: Legacy / risky Windows network features safe to disable on a modern solo-user machine (not on a homegroup, not sharing files on the LAN via SMBv1, not on a corporate discovery LAN). Each entry: name, description, disableCommand (PowerShell one-liner, run elevated), risk (low = universally safe, medium = may break specific LAN discovery scenarios), revertCommand.

features.name: SMB1Protocol
features.description: SMBv1 file sharing protocol. Vulnerable to EternalBlue / WannaCry class of exploits. Removed by default on fresh Win11 installs but often lingers on upgraded machines.
features.notes: Only breaks access to very old NAS boxes or Windows XP shares.

features.name: LLMNR
features.description: Link-Local Multicast Name Resolution. Broadcast-based name lookup used when DNS fails; primary vector for LLMNR/NBT-NS poisoning attacks. Disable via policy.
features.disableCommand: New-Item -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\DNSClient' -Force | Out-Null; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\DNSClient' -Name 'EnableMulticast' -Value 0 -Type DWord
features.notes: Modern DNS + mDNS cover the same use cases.

features.name: NetBIOSoverTCP
features.description: NetBIOS over TCP/IP name resolution. Same attack surface as LLMNR. Set per-adapter via WMI.
features.notes: Option 2 = disable NetBIOS over TCP/IP. Option 0 = default (use DHCP setting).

features.name: mDNS_Bonjour
features.description: Apple Bonjour mDNS service — installed alongside iTunes / Adobe Creative Cloud. Windows 10 20H1+ has native mDNS so Bonjour is redundant. Disable only if the third-party service exists.
features.disableCommand: Get-Service 'Bonjour Service' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Set-Service -StartupType Disabled; Get-Service 'Bonjour Service' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Service -Force
features.revertCommand: Get-Service 'Bonjour Service' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Set-Service -StartupType Automatic; Get-Service 'Bonjour Service' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Start-Service
features.notes: Breaks AirPrint / AirPlay device discovery from Windows. Do not disable Windows' native mDNS — different service.

features.name: WPAD
features.description: Web Proxy Auto-Discovery. Used to auto-detect a LAN proxy; also a common attack vector. Disable via the WinHTTP autoproxy service.
features.disableCommand: Set-Service -Name WinHttpAutoProxySvc -StartupType Disabled; Stop-Service -Name WinHttpAutoProxySvc -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
features.notes: Do NOT disable if the user is on a corporate network that publishes proxy.pac via WPAD.

features.name: RemoteRegistry
features.description: Remote Registry service — allows editing this PC's registry from another machine. Disabled by default on Win11 but included for older upgrades.
features.disableCommand: Set-Service -Name RemoteRegistry -StartupType Disabled; Stop-Service -Name RemoteRegistry -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
